question_zh: 如果前面的骑自行车的人行驶不稳定，你应该 _____
question_en: If a cyclist is travelling in an unsteady manner ahead, you should _____
options_zh: 给自己更多的时间超车。
options_en: Refrain from overtaking the cyclist.
Give yourself more time in overtaking the cyclist.
Overtake the cyclist quickly and quietly.
topic: 行人与弱势道路使用者

question_zh: 你前面有一个慢速行驶的摩托车手。你不确定骑手要做什么，你应该 _____
question_en: There is a slow moving motorcyclist ahead of you. You are not sure what the rider is going to do, you should _____
options_en: Pass on the left.
Pass on the right.
Stay behind.
topic: 行人与弱势道路使用者

question_zh: 学校交通协管员如何示意你停车？
question_en: How does a school warden signals you to stop?
options_zh: 通过指向对面人行道上的儿童。
options_en: By displaying a stop sign.
By giving you a hand signal.
By pointing to children on the opposition pavement.

question_zh: 在一辆配备后座安全带的汽车中，后座上8岁以下的儿童应该 _____
question_en: In a car equipped with rear seat belt, a child under 8 years old in the rear seat should _____
options_zh: 在他的/她的后面放一个软垫。
options_en: Sit between adult passengers.
Have a soft cushion behind him/her.
Use a child restraint.
topic: 行人与弱势道路使用者

question_zh: 汽车A打算超过卡车B。汽车A应该 _____
question_en: Car A intends to pass a lorry B. Car A should _____
options_en: Pass the lorry B after the junction.
Speed up to pass lorry B on the left.
Pass the lorry B on the right.

question_zh: 汽车A正准备进行U型转弯，汽车A应该 _____
question_en: Car A is about to make a U-turn, Car A should _____
options_en: Give way to car B.
Not give way to car B.
Turn along with car B.

question_zh: 如果一名驾驶员被暂停驾驶 _____ 个月，他将不得不再次参加并通过驾驶考试。
question_en: A driver will have to sit and pass the driving test again if he is suspended from driving for _____
options_en: 6 months.
8 months.
12 months.

question_zh: 在急弯处，你应该 _____
question_en: At a sharp bend you should _____
options_zh: 如果前方车辆速度慢，可以超车。
options_en: Not overtake other vehicles.
Overtake, if the speed of the vehicle in front is slow.
Follow closely behind the front car.

question_zh: 在雨天，轮胎花纹较少会 _____
question_en: On rainy day, less tread on your tyres will _____
options_en: Increase your braking distance.
Decrease your braking distance.
Not affect your braking distance.

question_zh: 如果你在转弯时增加速度，将会 _____
question_en: If you increase your speed when going round a bend, it will be _____
options_zh: 你很难保持预定的路径。
你更容易控制你的汽车。
options_en: Difficult for you to keep your intended path.
Safer for you.
Easier for you to control your car.

question_zh: 湿滑路面上的停车距离比干燥路面上长 ___ 倍。
question_en: The stopping distance on a wet road is ___ longer than on a dry road.
options_en: 4 times
3 times
2 times

question_zh: 在慢速行驶的交通中，你应该始终 _____
question_en: In slow moving traffic, you should always _____
options_zh: 鸣笛，以便前方的车辆能开得更快。
快速移动到排队较短的另一条车道。
options_en: Sound the horn so that vehicles in front will move faster.
Stay in your lane.
Move quickly to another lane with a shorter queue.

question_zh: 在环形交叉路口，你注意到一名骑自行车的人发出右转信号，你应该 _____
question_en: At a roundabout you notice a cyclist is signaling to turn right ahead, you should _____
options_zh: 给骑自行车的人留出足够的空间。
options_en: Overtake on the right.
Give the cyclist plenty of room.
Give a horn warning.

question_zh: 你应该如何超车骑自行车的人？
question_en: How should you overtake cyclists?
options_zh: 只鸣笛一次以警告他们。
慢速驾驶并留出足够的空间。
options_en: Use your horn just once to warn them.
Drive slowly and leave plenty of room.
Overtake them as quickly as possible.

question_zh: 如果你看到指示有道路维修的标志，你应该 _____
question_en: If you saw a sign indicating road repairs are going on, you should _____
options_zh: 减速并注意交通管制员和指示。
options_en: Stop immediately and wait for instructions.
Slow down and watch out for traffic controllers and instructions.
Maintain the same speed.

question_zh: 当你第一次感到困倦时，你最好的选择是什么？
question_en: What is the best choice you have to do at the first sign of drowsiness?
options_zh: 让新鲜空气进入车内，并在第一时间停车休息。
继续驾驶并努力保持清醒。
options_en: Slow down and continue at a constant speed.
Let fresh air gets into the car and at the first opportunity, stop and rest.
Continue to drive and try to keep awake.

question_zh: 接近建成区时，你应该 _____
question_en: When approaching a built-up area, you should _____
options_en: Drive at the same speed.
Reduce your speed.
Increase your speed.

question_zh: 警察指挥交通流的手势信号凌驾于 _____
question_en: Hand Signals given by Police officers directing the flow of traffic over-rules _____
options_zh: 仅道路标志和道路标记。
仅交通灯信号和交通法规。
options_en: Road signs and road markings only.
Traffic light signals and traffic regulations only.
Both A and B.

question_zh: 汽车A正在减速或停车。汽车B应该怎么做？
question_en: Car A is slowing down or stopping. What should Car B do?
options_zh: 鸣笛提醒可能正在过马路的行人。
减速并准备在必要时停车。
options_en: Sound the horn to alert pedestrians who may be crossing the road.
Reduce speed and be ready to stop if necessary.
Accelerate to pass the pedestrian crossing quickly.

question_zh: 在这个场景中，直行的汽车应该 _____
question_en: In this scenario the car that is going straight should _____
options_zh: 在路口之前从左侧快速超车。
options_en: Overtake by the left quickly before the junction.
Slow down and let the lorry turn.
Speed up and overtake.

question_zh: 当另一辆车紧跟在你后面时，你应该 _____
question_en: When another vehicle is following close behind, you should _____
options_zh: 移到左侧，允许后面的车辆超车。
开得更快，以免阻碍后面的车辆。
如果你以法定最高速度行驶，则忽略该车辆。
options_en: Move to the left and allow the vehicle behind to overtake.
Drive faster so as not to obstruct the vehicle behind.
Ignore the vehicle if you are travelling at the legal maximum speed.

question_zh: 在高速公路上如果道路畅通，你应该 _____
question_en: On the expressway if the road is clear, you should _____
options_en: Keep to the left lane.
Keep to the extreme right lane.
Drive in the centre lane.

question_zh: 当绕弯驾驶时速度增加，离心力的推力将 _____
question_en: When the speed increases while driving round a bend, the push of the centrifugal force will _____
options_en: Be greater.
Be lesser.
Remain unchanged.

question_zh: 在交通堵塞中，你应该 _____
question_en: In a traffic hold-up, you should _____
options_en: Switch off the engine.
Use the road shoulder.
Not change lanes.

question_zh: 当骑自行车的人将头转向后方时，这表明 _____
question_en: When a cyclist turns his head to the rear, it indicates that _____
options_en: He may change his direction.
He wants to stop.
His rear tyre is punctured.
topic: 行人与弱势道路使用者

question_zh: 当你准备左转且左侧有骑自行车的人时，你应该 _____
question_en: When about to turn left and there is a cyclist on the left, you should _____
options_zh: 开得更快以超过骑自行车的人。
减速并允许骑自行车的人先通过。
options_en: Horn to warn him.
Drive faster to pass the cyclist.
Slow down and allow the cyclist to pass first.
topic: 行人与弱势道路使用者

question_zh: 当被阳光照射或晃眼时，你应该 _____
question_en: When being glared or blinded by the sunlight, you should _____
options_zh: 使用你的遮阳板或戴太阳镜。
options_en: Use a cap or hat.
Use your sun visor or wear sun glasses.
Look at the left kerb.

question_zh: 当你沿着道路行驶时，你应该 _____
question_en: When driving along, you should _____
options_zh: 在通过每一个路口之前停车。
在你经过每一个支路之前进行检查。
options_en: Stop at every junction before proceeding further.
Accelerate to pass junctions quickly.
Check every side road before you pass them.

question_zh: 在狭窄的路线上左转时，你应该将你的车辆定位在 _____
question_en: When turning left in a narrow course you should position your vehicle _____
options_en: More to the right.
More to the left.
In the centre of the course.

question_zh: 在这个场景中显示的主要危险是什么？
question_en: What is the main hazard shown in this scenario?
options_zh: 骑自行车的人C正在过马路。
options_en: Cars A turning right.
Parked vehicle B at the junction.
The cyclist C crossing the road.

question_zh: 当汽车A正在左转时，汽车B的左转信号灯亮着。汽车A应该怎么做 _____
question_en: When Car A is making a left turn, car B's left turn signal is on. What should car A do _____
options_en: Move out slowly and turn.
Turn immediately.
Wait until Car B has turned left.

question_zh: 儿童何时会成为实际的道路危险？
question_en: When will a child becomes an actual road hazard?
options_zh: 当玩球的儿童突然将球踢到路上时。
options_en: When the child is walking by the side of the road.
When the child is playing by the side of the road.
When the child playing with a ball suddenly kicked the ball onto the road.
topic: 行人与弱势道路使用者

question_zh: 当一辆长车进行U型转弯时，它通常会先向 _____ 移动。
question_en: When a long vehicle makes a U-turn, it usually moves to the _____
options_en: Left before turning.
Right before turning.
Right then left before turning.

question_zh: 在交通灯路口后面跟着一辆大型车辆时，你应该 _____
question_en: When following behind a large vehicle at traffic light junctions, you should _____
options_zh: 保持更长的跟车距离，以便有更好的前方视野。
options_en: Keep a normal following distance.
Follow closely.
Keep a longer following distance to have a better view ahead.

question_zh: 你被允许在交通灯处进行U型转弯吗？
question_en: Are you permitted to make a U-turn at traffic lights?
options_zh: 不允许，除非在交叉路口有允许U型转弯的标志。
是的，如果没有与其他车辆碰撞的危险。
options_en: No, unless there is a U-turn permitted sign at the intersection.
Yes, at all times.
Yes, if there is no danger of colliding with another vehicle.

question_zh: 当来自支路的汽车没有让路给你时，你应该 _____
question_en: When the car from the side road does not give way to you, you should _____
options_zh: 快速切换到右车道以通过路口。
options_en: Sound the horn to stop the car from coming out.
Quickly switch to the right lane to pass the junction.
Slow down and allow the car to proceed.

question_zh: 当弯道上的迎面而来的汽车越过道路上的中心白线朝你的方向驶来时，你应该 _____
question_en: When the oncoming car at the bend has gone across the centre white line on the road towards your direction, you should _____
options_zh: 鸣笛并闪烁你的前灯以发出警告。
减速并移到道路的左侧。
options_en: Sound the horn and flash your headlight to give warning.
Slow down and move over to the left side of the road.
Brake hard and stop your car immediately.

question_zh: 车辆的停车距离包括 _____
question_en: The stopping distance of a vehicle comprises the _____
options_en: Thinking distance and the reaction distance.
Reaction distance and the braking distance.
Skidding distance and the braking distance.

question_zh: 你在哪里应该特别小心观察其他摩托车手和骑自行车的人？
question_en: Where should you take particular care to look out for other motorcyclists and cyclists?
options_en: At junctions.
At pedestrian crossings.
On one-way streets.
topic: 行人与弱势道路使用者

question_zh: 当你接近这个路口时，你应该 _____
question_en: When approaching this junction, you should _____
options_en: Turn left only.
Either go straight or turn left.
Go straight, and turn left or right.

question_zh: 当你接近这个路口时，你应该 _____
question_en: When you approach this junction, you should _____
options_zh: 如果没有迎面而来的车辆，则无需停车。
options_en: Turn right.
Stop, check and turn left only.
Need not stop if no oncoming traffic.

question_zh: 离开高速公路时，你应该 _____
question_en: When leaving the expressway, you should _____
options_zh: 在离开高速公路前完全停车。
在出口前提前移到左车道。
options_en: Always use the road shoulder.
Come to a stop before leaving the expressway.
Move to the left lane well before the exit.

question_zh: 在高速公路上行驶时，你应该 _____
question_en: When travelling on the expressway, you should _____
options_zh: 从最左侧车道超车其他车辆。
options_en: Overtake other vehicles by the extreme left lane.
Keep to the extreme right lane.
Refrain from using the extreme right lane.

question_zh: 你正跟着一辆大型车辆，它正要左转进入一条狭窄的道路。你应该采取什么行动？
question_en: You are following a large vehicle which is going to turn left into a narrow road. What action should you take?
options_zh: 在车辆驶出时从左侧通过。
options_en: Move out and overtake on the right.
Pass on the left as the vehicle moves out.
Be prepared to stop behind.

question_zh: 占用车道 _____
question_en: Road hogging _____
options_zh: 确保交通更顺畅地流动。
导致其他车辆危险地从左侧超车。
导致其他车辆从右侧超车。
options_en: Ensures a smoother flow of traffic.
Causes other vehicles to overtake dangerously on the left.
Causes other vehicles to overtake on the right.

question_zh: 你正跟着一个在不平坦道路上的骑自行车的人。你应该 _____
question_en: You are following a cyclist on an uneven road. You should _____
options_zh: 留出额外的空间，以防他们突然转向避开坑洼。
紧密跟随，以便他们可以在镜子中看到你。
options_en: Overtake immediately.
Allow extra room in case they swerve to avoid pot-holes.
Follow closely so you can be seen in their mirrors.

question_zh: 你发出道路信号是为了 _____
question_en: You give road signals in order to _____
options_zh: 警告并帮助所有道路使用者，包括行人。
options_en: Help other car drivers only.
Warn heavy vehicles only.
Warn and help all road users including pedestrians.

question_zh: 你正等待从一条支路驶出。为什么你应该仔细观察摩托车？
question_en: You are waiting to come out of a side road. Why should you watch carefully for motocycles?
options_zh: 摩托车小巧且难以看到。
options_en: Motorcycles have right of way.
Motorcycles are small and hard to see.
Motorcycles are usually faster than cars.

question_zh: 汽车A应该转入哪个车道？
question_en: Which lane should Car A turn into?
options_en: Lane C or D.
Lane B or C.
Lane C.

question_zh: 汽车Y应该转入哪个车道？
question_en: Which lane should Car Y turn into?
options_en: Lane 1
Lane 2
Lane 3

question_zh: 当你无法确认紧急车辆的接近方向时，你应该 _____
question_en: When you cannot confirm the direction of the approach of an emergency vehicle, you should _____
options_en: Maintain your speed and position.
Increase the speed of your vehicle.
Slow down your speed and move to the left lane.

question_zh: 当被摩托车手紧跟车尾时，你应该 _____
question_en: When being tailgated by a motorcyclist, you should _____
options_en: Jam your brakes as a warning.
Drive faster to increase the gap.
Slow down and assist it to pass you.

question_zh: 你正以法定限速行驶。一辆车快速从后面靠近，并闪烁前灯。你应该 _____
question_en: You are travelling at the legal speed limit. A vehicle comes up quickly behind, flashing its headlights. You should _____
options_zh: 保持你的速度以阻止该车辆超车。
猛踩刹车以显示你的刹车灯。
options_en: Maintain your speed to prevent the vehicle from overtaking.
Allow the vehicle to overtake.
Tap the brakes sharply to show your brake lights.

question_zh: 你看到一个拿着白色手杖的行人。这意味着这个人是 _____
question_en: You see a pedestrian with a white walking stick. This means that the person is _____
options_en: Physically disabled.
Blind only.
Deaf only.
topic: 行人与弱势道路使用者

question_zh: 哪个道路使用者造成了危险？
question_en: Which road user has caused a hazard?
options_en: The parked car A
The pedestrian B walking along the road
The moving car C

question_zh: 当你接近弯道时，你应该在 _____ 减速。
question_en: When you approach a bend, you should slow down _____
options_en: As you drive round the bend.
As you leave the bend.
Before you enter the bend.

question_zh: 当你接近这个交通灯路口时，你应该 _____
question_en: When you approach this traffic light junction, you should _____
options_zh: 减速并准备在灯光改变时停车。
加速通过路口，以赶在灯光改变之前。
保持高速，以免扰乱交通流量。
options_en: Slow down and be ready to stop when the light changes.
Speed up to pass the junction before the light changes.
Maintain a high speed so as not to disrupt the traffic flow.

question_zh: 你正跟着一辆卡车接近一个“U型转弯”标志。司机发出右转信号但向左移动，你应该 _____
question_en: You are following a lorry approaching a 'U' turn sign. The driver signals right but moves to the left, you should _____
options_en: Wait behind the lorry.
Overtake on the left-hand side.
Overtake on the right-hand side.

question_zh: 高速公路最右边的外侧车道是做什么用的？
question_en: What is the right-most outer lane of the expressway meant for?
options_zh: 以最高限速行驶的车辆。
options_en: Emergency vehicles and overtaking.
Vehicles travelling at the maximum speed limit.
Slow moving vehicles.
